---
title: "Our Team"
---

<div class="team-grid">

<div class="team-member">
<img src="../images/team_photos/test_pic.jpg" class="team-photo">

<h3>Kitty Cat</h3>
<strong>President</strong>

<p>Presidential president things. Beloved founder.</p>
</div>

<div class="team-member">
<img src="../images/team_photos/test_pic2.jpg" class="team-photo">

<h3>Also a Cat</h3>
<strong>Vice President</strong>

<p>Focusing on focusing.</p>
</div>

<div class="team-member">
<img src="../images/team_photos/test_pic2.jpg" class="team-photo">

<h3>Third Cat</h3>
<strong>Director</strong>

<p>Very important cat.</p>
</div>

</div>
